title: Ingestion Projects
description: Ingestion Projects organize the full data pipeline from raw source files to a validated OMOP CDM schema. Each project tracks WhiteRabbit scanning, field mapping, validation, and ETL execution in a single workspace.
tips: Create one project per data source — each project maps a single database or file set to OMOP CDM.
Projects advance through stages: scan → map → validate ��� execute. You can return to earlier stages at any time.
Use descriptive names like 'Acumenus Claims 2024' to distinguish projects when you have multiple sources.
Delete abandoned projects to keep the list clean — project metadata is retained in audit logs.
The project status badge shows the current pipeline stage at a glance.
